meta.status_update: Full 61-item array. Likelihood scores removed. Real-world mapping added to PENDING records.

predictions.title: Donald Trump Presidency
predictions.prediction: Lisa becomes president and mentions inheriting a budget crunch from President Trump.
predictions.real_event: Donald Trump elected 45th President.

predictions.title: Disney/Fox Merger
predictions.prediction: A sign reads '20th Century Fox — A Division of Walt Disney Co.'
predictions.real_event: Disney acquired Fox for $71.3 billion.

predictions.title: Autocorrect Fails
predictions.prediction: An Apple Newton translates 'Beat up Martin' to 'Eat up Martha'.
predictions.real_event: Apple engineers used this exact joke when designing the iPhone autocorrect.

predictions.title: Smartwatches
predictions.prediction: Characters use watch-communicators long before the Apple Watch.
predictions.real_event: The rise of modern smartwatches like the Apple Watch.

predictions.title: Video Chat
predictions.prediction: Lisa and Marge talk via a rotary phone equipped with a FaceTime-style screen.
predictions.real_event: Video conferencing and FaceTime become ubiquitous.

predictions.title: Cypress Hill & The LSO
predictions.prediction: The rap group accidentally books the London Symphony Orchestra while high.
predictions.real_event: Cypress Hill performed with the LSO at the Royal Albert Hall.

predictions.title: US Men's Curling Gold
predictions.prediction: Homer and Marge beat Sweden for Olympic gold in curling.
predictions.real_event: The US men's curling team defeated Sweden for their first-ever gold medal.

predictions.title: Siegfried & Roy Tiger Attack
predictions.prediction: Gunter and Ernst are mauled by their white tiger.
predictions.real_event: Roy Horn was critically injured by a white tiger during a performance.

predictions.title: Nobel Prize Winner
predictions.prediction: Milhouse bets on Finnish economist Bengt R. Holmström to win the Nobel Prize.
predictions.real_event: Bengt R. Holmström won the Nobel Memorial Prize in Economic Sciences.

predictions.title: The God Particle
predictions.prediction: Homer writes an equation that accurately predicts the mass of the Higgs boson.
predictions.real_event: Scientists confirmed the existence of the Higgs boson particle.

predictions.title: Faulty Voter Machines
predictions.prediction: A voting machine changes Homer's vote from Obama to McCain.
predictions.real_event: A voting machine in Pennsylvania was caught switching Obama votes to Romney.

predictions.title: Game of Thrones Finale
predictions.prediction: A fantasy parody episode shows a dragon burning down a village.
predictions.real_event: Daenerys uses a dragon to destroy King's Landing in the show's finale.

predictions.title: Beatles Fan Mail
predictions.prediction: Ringo Starr answers a decades-old fan letter.
predictions.real_event: Paul McCartney responded to a decades-old fan recording.

predictions.title: FIFA Corruption Scandal
predictions.prediction: An episode predicts a massive football corruption scandal and an executive's arrest.
predictions.real_event: Several FIFA executives were arrested for wire fraud, racketeering, and money laundering.

predictions.title: The Matrix 4
predictions.prediction: A background poster for 'A Matrix Christmas' teases a fourth movie.
predictions.real_event: The Matrix Resurrections (the 4th film) was released.

predictions.title: Super Bowl XXVI
predictions.prediction: Lisa correctly predicts the Washington Redskins will win the Super Bowl.
predictions.real_event: The Washington Redskins won Super Bowl XXVI.

predictions.title: Super Bowl XXVIII
predictions.prediction: The episode was redubbed to correctly predict a Dallas Cowboys win.
predictions.real_event: The Dallas Cowboys won Super Bowl XXVIII.

predictions.title: Super Bowl XXIX
predictions.prediction: The episode was redubbed a third time, successfully predicting a 49ers victory.
predictions.real_event: The San Francisco 49ers won Super Bowl XXIX.

predictions.title: Japanese PM Eats Radioactive Fish
predictions.prediction: Mr. Burns eats a three-eyed mutant fish to prove it's safe.
predictions.real_event: Japan's PM ate fish from Fukushima to prove it was safe.

predictions.title: Don Mattingly's Hair
predictions.prediction: Mr. Burns benches baseball star Don Mattingly for his hair.
predictions.real_event: The Yankees benched Mattingly for refusing to cut his hair.

predictions.title: Pandemic Hysteria
predictions.prediction: The 'Osaka Flu' causes mass panic where citizens demand placebos.
predictions.real_event: COVID-19 pandemic caused mass hysteria and hoarding.

predictions.title: Murder Hornets
predictions.prediction: A crate of 'killer bees' is unleashed on the town during a pandemic.
predictions.real_event: Asian giant 'murder hornets' arrived in the US during COVID-19.

predictions.title: Tom Hanks Endorses the US Gov
predictions.prediction: Hanks cameos in The Simpsons Movie to lend credibility to the government.
predictions.real_event: Tom Hanks hosted a Biden administration video highlighting economic recovery.

predictions.title: NSA Mass Surveillance
predictions.prediction: The NSA is depicted listening to everyone's phone calls.
predictions.real_event: Edward Snowden leaked documents revealing mass NSA surveillance.

predictions.title: Baby Translators
predictions.prediction: Herb Powell invents a machine that translates baby cries.
predictions.real_event: Various apps and AI tools have been developed to interpret infant cries.

predictions.title: Grease Theft
predictions.prediction: Homer steals grease from fast-food fryers to sell.
predictions.real_event: Thieves increasingly began stealing used restaurant grease to sell for biofuel.

predictions.title: Early iPod Design
predictions.prediction: A high-tech intercom system looks exactly like the first-generation Apple iPod.
predictions.real_event: Apple releases the first iPod with a matching scroll wheel design.

predictions.title: FarmVille
predictions.prediction: Kids play a VR 'Yard Work Simulator'.
predictions.real_event: The massive popularity of digital farming games like FarmVille.

predictions.title: The Shard
predictions.prediction: A futuristic skyline of London features a skyscraper resembling The Shard.
predictions.real_event: Construction began on The Shard in London.

predictions.title: Horse Meat Scandal
predictions.prediction: Lunchlady Doris uses 'assorted horse parts' in school meals.
predictions.real_event: Europe faced a massive scandal where foods advertised as beef contained horse meat.

predictions.title: Rolling Stones Still Touring
predictions.prediction: A poster in Lisa's dorm room shows the Stones touring in 2010.
predictions.real_event: The Rolling Stones continued to tour well past 2010.

predictions.title: Censorship of Michelangelo's David
predictions.prediction: Springfield protests the statue's nudity.
predictions.real_event: A Florida principal was fired for showing the statue to students.

predictions.title: The Cybertruck
predictions.prediction: Homer designs an ugly, boxy car that resembles Tesla's Cybertruck.
predictions.real_event: Tesla unveiled the boxy Cybertruck.

predictions.title: Ebola Outbreak
predictions.prediction: Marge reads a book called 'Curious George and the Ebola Virus'.
predictions.real_event: A massive Ebola outbreak spread across West Africa.

predictions.title: Lady Gaga's Super Bowl Halftime
predictions.prediction: Gaga performs suspended by cables in Springfield.
predictions.real_event: Gaga performed her Super Bowl LI halftime show suspended by cables.

predictions.title: Colonizing Mars
predictions.prediction: Marge and Lisa volunteer to live in a corporate colony on Mars.
predictions.real_event: SpaceX and others are actively developing tech for Mars colonies, but it hasn't happened yet.

predictions.title: Ivanka Trump 2028 Campaign
predictions.prediction: A background gag features an 'Ivanka 2028' campaign button.
predictions.real_event: Ivanka Trump has been involved in politics, though no 2028 campaign has been announced.

predictions.title: Big Ben Goes Digital
predictions.prediction: London's famous clock tower is shown with a digital face retrofitted onto it.
predictions.real_event: Big Ben still retains its traditional analog face.

predictions.title: President Lisa Simpson
predictions.prediction: A straight female president who plays the saxophone is elected.
predictions.real_event: The US has not yet elected a female president fitting this description.

predictions.title: Cryogenic Freezing
predictions.prediction: Jasper freezes himself in the Kwik-E-Mart to survive into the future.
predictions.real_event: Commercial human cryogenics to revive people is still not functionally viable.

predictions.title: A Giant Glass Dome
predictions.prediction: Enclosing a polluted city in a massive glass dome.
predictions.real_event: No entire city has been enclosed in a dome.

predictions.title: Hover Cars
predictions.prediction: Standard vehicles are entirely replaced by floating hover cars.
predictions.real_event: Flying cars are in prototype phases but not mainstream replacements.

predictions.title: Holographic Trees
predictions.prediction: Real trees go extinct and are replaced by holograms.
predictions.real_event: Trees are still very much real.

predictions.title: Robot Librarians & Gardeners
predictions.prediction: Androids fully take over municipal jobs.
predictions.real_event: AI and robots exist, but fully functioning android civil servants are not ubiquitous.

predictions.title: Network Mergers (CNNBCBS)
predictions.prediction: CNN, NBC, and CBS merge into one massive news monopoly.
predictions.real_event: Media consolidation continues, but these specific networks remain separate.

predictions.title: World War III (British Rescue)
predictions.prediction: A future war where the UK has to step in to save the United States.
predictions.real_event: World War III has not occurred.

predictions.title: Fox Becomes a Hardcore Sex Channel
predictions.prediction: Fox changes its programming to hardcore pornography so gradually no one notices.
predictions.real_event: Fox remains a traditional broadcasting network.

predictions.title: Permanent Antarctic Settlements
predictions.prediction: Regular citizens live in casual suburban settlements in Antarctica.
predictions.real_event: Antarctica is still restricted primarily to scientists and temporary researchers.

predictions.title: Literal Zombie Apocalypse
predictions.prediction: Brain-eating zombies overrun an American town.
predictions.real_event: Zombies remain purely fictional.

predictions.title: Commercial Time Travel
predictions.prediction: Time machines become easily accessible, like a toaster.
predictions.real_event: Time travel remains impossible under current physics.

predictions.title: Theme Park Robot Uprising
predictions.prediction: Amusement park animatronics attempt to murder tourists.
predictions.real_event: Disney animatronics are getting advanced, but they haven't revolted.

predictions.title: Six-Winged Commercial Airplanes
predictions.prediction: Passenger jets evolve to have two more sets of wings.
predictions.real_event: Aviation design still relies heavily on standard two-wing models.

predictions.title: Mind Control Music
predictions.prediction: The Navy recruits pop bands to slip subliminal recruitment messages into radio hits.
predictions.real_event: No proof of subliminal military pop music exists (yet).

predictions.title: Multi-Translation Collar for Dogs
predictions.prediction: A collar allows dogs to speak flawless English.
predictions.real_event: We have buttons for dogs to press, but no direct thought-to-English translation collars.

predictions.title: Donald Trump in a Casket
predictions.prediction: An image shows Donald Trump lying in a casket with a Secret Service agent nearby.
predictions.real_event: Never aired on the show. This is a digitally created hoax drawn by an internet troll.

predictions.title: The 'Corona Virus' Graphic
predictions.prediction: A news anchor graphic reads 'Corona Virus' during a sickness outbreak.
predictions.real_event: The original episode aired with the graphic 'Osaka Flu'. Internet pranksters altered it.

predictions.title: Queen Elizabeth's Exact Death Year
predictions.prediction: An image shows Queen Elizabeth II in a coffin with the dates 1926-2022.
predictions.real_event: Completely faked image. The show never predicted her death date.

predictions.title: Kobe Bryant's Helicopter Crash
predictions.prediction: A viral video claimed the show predicted this tragedy.
predictions.real_event: Footage was stolen from Comedy Central's Legends of Chamberlain Heights, not The Simpsons.

predictions.title: Notre Dame Fire
predictions.prediction: Mr. Burns stands happily in front of the burning cathedral in Paris.
predictions.real_event: Another internet photoshop job created for social media clout.

predictions.title: Kamala Harris Inauguration Outfit
predictions.prediction: President Lisa wears purple pearls and a purple outfit.
predictions.real_event: While Kamala Harris wore purple, it was a real-world nod to the suffragette movement, not a prediction. Lisa was also President, not VP.

predictions.title: The 2024 Electoral Map
predictions.prediction: Mr. Burns stands in front of a map matching a real-world election map.
predictions.real_event: Digitally altered screenshot from a 2012 promotional short.
